## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested in browser with `npm run dev`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Wording is plain language — no jargon walls, no filler phrases
- [ ] Commit messages follow the [format](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-format)
- [ ] This PR focuses on one concern only
